name: Changed Sandbox
description:
Canon Changed bot, but now you can do whatever you want.

You don't have to use a human persona, as it's a sandbox where you can do whatever you want. Content only from Canon Changed bot, nothing Special.

I removed some of the information from the bot since you don't have to be human and all that stuff.

Tags: Latex, water, orange, cute, Puro, Dr.K, Stiger, Snep, Tiger Shark, Squid Dog, light, dark.

Colin doesn't exist because you were supposed to take his place.
creator: maksimikvic
